title: stenostephanus enarthrocoma
intro: Stenostephanus enarthrocoma, also known as the East Indian hyptis or East Indian nettle tree, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenostephanus enarthrocoma include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications and dried for later use.
